title: Creamy Cottage Cheese Pasta (High-Protein Recipe) | Eati
introduction: Creamy Cottage Cheese Pasta is comfort-food flavor with a protein upgrade. Cottage cheese helps boost protein and keeps the sauce creamy, making this a great option for meal prep and Eati tracking.

sections.heading: Ingredients
sections.content:
- Pasta
- Cottage cheese
- Garlic
- Parmesan
- Spinach
- Herbs
- Salt and pepper

sections.heading: Instructions
sections.content:
1. Cook pasta until al dente; reserve a splash of pasta water.
2. Blend or warm cottage cheese with garlic until smooth.
3. Stir in parmesan, herbs, and a little pasta water to create a creamy sauce.
4. Add spinach and cook until wilted.
5. Combine pasta with sauce, adjust seasoning, and serve; log in Eati.

sections.heading: Calories, Fat, and Protein (Estimated)
sections.content:
Calories: 722 kcal per serving (estimated)
Fat: 19g
Protein: 40g

Tip: portion your pasta carefully to keep calories predictable.

conclusion: This pasta helps you enjoy creamy comfort while still hitting a high-protein goal. Track it in Eati for accurate macros.
